name.ja: <ruby>報<rt>ほう</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt>どう</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt>かっ</rt></ruby><ruby>戦<rt>せん</rt></ruby>スクーピーズ

summoning_condition.en: You can Maximum Summon this card together with "Reporter Wars Scoopies [L]" and "Reporter Wars Scoopies [R]".

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the top card of their Deck. If it was a Monster Card, this card gains 800 ATK. If this card is in Maximum Mode, this card gains an additional 1000 ATK and its attacks pierce, until the end of this turn. Your opponent places the excavated card on the top of their Deck.
